caveat: GOLD-CANDIDATE (sandbox, pre-promotion). NPHDB quarterly PO listing for the New Children's Hospital. One row per source line. amount_semantics=po_committed. BAM Building rows are disputed conciliator/adjudicator awards (Notice of Dissatisfaction) — a single ~€107.6m row dominates >50% of the file: outlier_warning=true, never headline a raw sum. Unions with public_payments_fact at promotion. PRIVACY QUARANTINE DEFERRED (public_display=True for all rows).
